name: elder-shorts-pwa
description: PWA short-video feed for elders with server-assisted cache queue and client recent-video cache.

scripts.ytdlp:doctor: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); for (const cmd of [['yt-dlp','--version'],['py','-m','yt_dlp','--version'],['python','-m','yt_dlp','--version']]) { const r=spawnSync(cmd[0],cmd.slice(1),{encoding:'utf8'}); console.log(cmd.join(' '), '=>', (r.stdout||r.stderr||r.error?.message||'').trim()); }"
